name: quarkus-forge-docs

scripts.docs:assemble: rm -rf build/pages && mkdir -p build/pages && cp -R build/site/. build/pages/ && cp index.html build/pages/index.html && npm run docs:build:css
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:build:antora && npm run docs:assemble

// overrides: Pin undici to the latest v7 security-fix line compatible with linkinator.
